chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1877 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Naveed Anjum, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel the property in the use of Police department has been allotted to association, hence, private property, therefore, police chowki thereon may be removed. Perusal of the documents placed on record demonstrates that while it is alleged that title of the property vested in association the present petition has been filed by the individual. Learned counsel remained unable to befall the petitioner within the definition of aggrieved person per Article 199 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, hence, the petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
